# NumberInput

A numeric input component with increment and decrement controls. Composed of multiple sub-components for flexible layout.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  NumberInput,
  NumberInputField,
  NumberInputControl,
  NumberIncrementTrigger,
  NumberDecrementTrigger,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `NumberInput` | The root wrapper (renders `NumberInput.Root`). Manages value, min, max, and step |
| `NumberInputField` | The text input field for the number |
| `NumberInputControl` | Container for the increment and decrement triggers |
| `NumberIncrementTrigger` | Button to increment the value |
| `NumberDecrementTrigger` | Button to decrement the value |

## NumberInput (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `min` | `number` | - | The minimum allowed value |
| `max` | `number` | - | The maximum allowed value |
| `step` | `number` | `1` | The amount to increment or decrement by |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled value |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | Initial value for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string, valueAsNumber: number }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the value changes |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is disabled |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is read-only |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<NumberInput defaultValue="5" min={0} max={100}>
  <NumberInputField />
  <NumberInputControl>
    <NumberIncrementTrigger />
    <NumberDecrementTrigger />
  </NumberInputControl>
</NumberInput>
```

### With step

```jsx
<NumberInput defaultValue="0" step={5} min={0} max={50}>
  <NumberInputField />
  <NumberInputControl>
    <NumberIncrementTrigger />
    <NumberDecrementTrigger />
  </NumberInputControl>
</NumberInput>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [value, setValue] = useState("10");

<NumberInput
  value={value}
  onValueChange={(e) => setValue(e.value)}
  min={1}
  max={99}
>
  <NumberInputField />
  <NumberInputControl>
    <NumberIncrementTrigger />
    <NumberDecrementTrigger />
  </NumberInputControl>
</NumberInput>
```

### With Field wrapper

```jsx
<Field label="Quantity" required>
  <NumberInput defaultValue="1" min={1} max={10}>
    <NumberInputField />
    <NumberInputControl>
      <NumberIncrementTrigger />
      <NumberDecrementTrigger />
    </NumberInputControl>
  </NumberInput>
</Field>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern for flexible layout control
- Supports min, max, and step constraints
- Keyboard-friendly with arrow key support
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
- Composable with Field for labels and validation
